koHoldEyeRepair.scope: 512px source eye semantics with canonical 256px derivation

temporalReview.reviewMethod: full chronological battle180 contact plus critical action-strip inspection

actions.attack: anticipation, contact and recovery remain ordered
actions.skill: wind-up, effect beat and recovery remain ordered
actions.counter: reaction, return strike and recovery remain ordered
actions.knockaway: launch, travel and terminal fall remain continuous
actions.down: loss of balance, fall and stable KO hold remain continuous
actions.revive: starts from the exact same-view KO hold and rises cleanly

repairs: localized opaque face-interior RGB spiral eye on down-8
same-view repaired down-8 is copied byte-for-byte to revive-1

strictKoTemporalReview.down: one-way collapse, no prone-supine-prone flip, stable final alpha hold
strictKoTemporalReview.revive: exact KO start followed by monotonic recovery without re-collapse
strictKoTemporalReview.expression: unfocused/spiral revivable KO; no sleep, smile, X eye, death, or gore
